agent_feedback: Mobile UX evaluator scored mobile_first_ux 9.3, responsive_design 9.5, interaction_polish 8.9, visual_hierarchy 9.2 and requested toast, pane transition, and editor density polish.

Production evaluator identified missing duplicate UX, lint config failure, lack of smoke automation, zero-duration validation inconsistency, reset confirmation gap, and missing user-facing storage recovery.
fixes: Added Duplicate Routine action in the routine shelf.
Added Duplicate Step action in the editor.
Changed save validation to use rawDurationSeconds so zero-duration steps are truly rejected.
Added reset confirmation for non-idle or partially elapsed sessions.
Moved mobile toast above timer controls and tab bar.
Added visible mobile editor field labels and 16px mobile input text.
Added ESLint flat config and made npm run lint clean.
Added npm run smoke with 13 production smoke checks.
verification: npm run lint passed with no warnings.

Mobile 390x844 browser smoke showed exactly one active pane, duplicate buttons present, 52px tab buttons, no horizontal overflow, seven ARIA progressbars, toast bottom offset active, and no console errors.
